error.installFailed: Daedalus backend could not be installed
error.backendMissing: Daedalus backend is missing or damaged

home.titleWithoutWorkspace: What would you like to work on?
home.titleWithWorkspace: What should we work on for {{workspaceName}}?
home.subtitleWithoutWorkspace: Choose a workspace or start without one.
home.subtitleWithWorkspace: Describe the next task for this workspace.

deleteWorkspace.title: Delete workspace?
deleteWorkspace.body: This will delete the workspace from Daedalus and permanently delete its sessions. It will not delete files from your Godot project folder.

menu.placeholder: This settings section will be implemented later.

about.title: About
about.sourceDescription: Visit our GitHub repository for source code, issues, and contributions.

backend.description: Local RPC, workflow, MCP, and Godot integration service.

deleteSession.title: Delete archived session?
deleteSession.description: This permanently deletes this archived session.

deleteAll.title: Delete archived sessions?
deleteAll.description: This will permanently delete {{count}} archived session matching the current filter.
deleteAll.description_other: This will permanently delete {{count}} archived sessions matching the current filter.

sessionTitle.title: Session title model
sessionTitle.description: Used for automatic session renaming and lightweight title generation.

workflowPlanner.title: Workflow planner model
workflowPlanner.description: Used for planning agent workflows before execution.

imageRecognition.title: Image recognition model
imageRecognition.description: Used when the active chat model cannot consume image context directly.

imageGeneration.title: Image generation/edit model
imageGeneration.description: Used by @image-gen and mcp_image_generate for text-to-image or image-to-image tasks. This must be configured explicitly.

gitCommit.title: Git commit model
gitCommit.description: Used to generate commit messages from workspace Git diffs. Defaults to the main model when unset.

commandReview.title: Command review model
commandReview.description: Reviews free terminal commands in Auto-safe mode. When unset, every command asks for your approval.

errors.load: Failed to load default model settings

delete.title: Delete MCP server?
delete.description: Delete {{name}} from Daedalus Studio. Stored secrets for this MCP server will also be removed.

userPrompt.title: User prompt
userPrompt.description: Custom instructions appended to new AI requests.

gitCommitPrompt.title: Git commit prompt
gitCommitPrompt.description: Custom instructions used only when generating commit messages.

commandReviewPrompt.title: Supplemental review preferences
commandReviewPrompt.description: Additional preferences for Auto-safe command review. Fixed safety rules always take precedence.

provider.newKeyHint: Only a newly entered key will be saved.

search.title: Search
search.configureProvider: Configure the selected provider API key in Provider settings before web search can be used.

enabled.title: Enable web search
enabled.description: Allow every conversation to use the configured web search tool when current information is needed.

model.title: Search model
model.description: Choose the provider-native search model used by the global web search tool.

maxResults.title: Search result count
maxResults.description: Default number of search results returned to the assistant when a search tool call does not override it.

errors.load: Failed to load web search settings
errors.save: Failed to save web search settings

delete.title: Delete skill?
delete.description: Delete {{name}} from Daedalus Studio. This removes the personal skill files but does not change any Godot project files.

empty.none: No custom skills yet. Ask the agent to create a skill, or install one from ZIP/folder.

install.description: Project installs require an active workspace. Personal installs are available across workspaces.
install.title: Install skill

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose the Studio color theme for this device.

godot.title: Godot environment
godot.description: Used when a workspace does not provide its own Godot executable path.

autoExpandTodoList.title: Auto-expand todo list
autoExpandTodoList.description: Expand the workflow todo list when a session creates a new todo list.

autoCheckForUpdates.title: Check for updates on startup
autoCheckForUpdates.description: Check for Daedalus Studio and backend updates when the app starts.

minimizeToTrayOnClose.title: Minimize to tray on close
minimizeToTrayOnClose.description: Hide Daedalus Studio to the system tray when the window close button is clicked.

errors.godotExecutable: Failed to validate the Godot executable
